manifest_source: Gradle merged release manifest including dependency contributions

declared_permissions.name: android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE
declared_permissions.purpose: Basic network connectivity state used by bundled networking and authentication components.

declared_permissions.name: android.permission.INTERNET
declared_permissions.purpose: HTTPS access to DIREKT API and approved authentication services.

declared_permissions.name: com.google.android.providers.gsf.permission.READ_GSERVICES
declared_permissions.purpose: Google/Firebase service support contributed by the authentication dependency surface.

declared_permissions.name: com.kudzimusar.direkt.DYNAMIC_RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED_PERMISSION
declared_permissions.purpose: AndroidX-generated protection for non-exported dynamic receivers inside the app boundary.

current_play_declaration_assessment.reason: The merged release manifest contains two normal network permissions plus dependency/app-scoped service and receiver-protection declarations. None adds a dangerous runtime permission. Any future permission change must update this inventory and pass merged-manifest review.

planned_feature_rule.location: Manual area search remains the required fallback. Do not add background location. Foreground location requires a separate evidence-backed change and Play review.
planned_feature_rule.camera_and_media: Prefer system photo/file pickers and scoped access rather than broad storage permissions.
planned_feature_rule.phone_sms: Do not request SMS or call-log permissions for OTP or contact handoff.
planned_feature_rule.contacts: Not required for MVP. Use minimum-scope platform picker if a future approved feature genuinely needs contacts.
planned_feature_rule.notifications: Add POST_NOTIFICATIONS only when production notification delivery is implemented and the user-facing rationale/fallback is tested.

submission_boundary: Play Console makes the final permissions determination from the uploaded AAB. Recheck this inventory against the exact release candidate merged manifest before submission.
